text: Artificial intelligence is transforming the modern workplace. One major change is automation, where AI handles repetitive tasks like data entry or scheduling. This frees up employees to focus on more complex, creative work. AI also powers productivity tools, such as smart assistants that manage emails or software that analyzes large amounts of data quickly. However, the key is human-AI collaboration. Technology works best when it supports people, not replaces them. As a result, many jobs are changing. Workers now need to learn new skills, such as working alongside AI systems and interpreting their output. While some roles may disappear, others will emerge, focusing on designing and managing these intelligent tools.
